dialogues: Both of these work. Take a look at them side by side. Which graph is easier to read?
You picked Scale of 10. The bars line up cleanly with the gridlines, which makes the values easy to read.
You picked Scale of 5. It shows more detail with the in-between values.
You think they're both easy to read. You're right. Both scales work for this data.
When more than one scale works, you get to choose.
